---
title: 'Christmas 2011'
date: '2011-12-01T04:04:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7738257808228839632'
blogger_filename: '/2011/11/blog-post.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Christmas'
---

<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0611-634bf3d9d8e7.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0611-46341ba154a5.jpg" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0612-c0ab615ee010.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0612-9abb8529439d.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0808-233d5763c315.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0808-39adcce6c831.jpg" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0811-5d8c7e9c3eda.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0811-da3b79425d4f.jpg" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0767-53a29cb84673.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="200" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0767-0f415bfcaa6b.jpg" width="150" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0857-19184ae1cf8e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0857-3d7692730b36.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0872-71ffbdfda9bd.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0872-d18215297da7.jpg" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0896-3a2c08f68ad2.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0896-d5e34065b9c1.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0914-302f66041345.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0914-6d91b142e680.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0919-fb1003847b7e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0919-968d5199ef75.jpg" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0921-961bdc413bf2.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0921-50bbc20ca3ff.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0936-7a076f63fdf5.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0936-e8eb37c1aaf9.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0973-cd6945aa72da.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0973-5ddcc3bfcfe1.jpg" width="200" /></a><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0985-689cf401334b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="150" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0985-b756f57b94e4.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0632-f58d35e9317a.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="240" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-0632-47b98533cd2e.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1059-5105591e744e.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1059-5f563488def2.jpg" width="240" /></a></div>
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1003-7d1f6c2dd71b.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: right; float: right; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-left: 1em;"><img border="0" height="320" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/img-1003-aecd5a36e13b.jpg" width="240" /></a>
